title: Eva or pilot Which is the dominant soul
display_title: Eva or pilot Which is the dominant soul
wikitext:
[]: Eva or pilot? Which is the dominant soul?             Quote Post by Bender » Wed Sep 07, 2011 4:39 pm I was re-watching episode 24 and I forget which one is the controller. Is it cause Asuka was missing or Kyoko that Kaworu could synch with it?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Sep 07, 2011 5:23 pm Kaworu can pilot Unit 02 because Kyoko's soul is "shutting itself up". Basically Kyoko's refusing to control Unit 02's body, so Kaworu is capable of possessing it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hawq » Tue Dec 06, 2011 3:10 pm It probably all depends on the situation, in that case as said the soul is basically wanting nothing to do with events + he does have a slight advantage as well, in other cases (OK pretty much just those involving unit 1) it seems the pilot is kind of irrelevant to the action as they are incapacitated in some way or have no power to the controls

[]:             Quote Post by Xacebans » Wed Dec 07, 2011 7:40 pm In that particular fight, Kaworu's soul was completely dominant, but that's a special circumstance due to Kaworu's speshull nature. I think in most fights the pilots are in command (with a bit of help from the Eva's soul, perhaps) unless there's berserking going on. Remember the synchro rate--I think when the synchro rate is highest the Eva's soul is helping the pilot the most; their commands are more synchronized.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Wed Dec 07, 2011 8:03 pm He said because the dormant soul within the Eva was in hiding, IIRC. That can't mean Asuka, it has to mean Kyoko.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 07, 2011 8:35 pm Xacebans wrote: I think in most fights the pilots are in command (with a bit of help from the Eva's soul, perhaps)

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Wed Dec 07, 2011 8:52 pm Jeff Goldlbum.

[]: Roland Emmerich be damned. Bl             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Wed Dec 07, 2011 9:01 pm ^ No, Will Smith (the pilot) was the dominant one there.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Wed Dec 07, 2011 9:20 pm Reichu wrote: But, as we've seen, a synch rate that's too high results in the pilot dissolving and the Eva's previously suppressed consciousness -- her own soul -- coming to the fore. It's a ... Jungian thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Dec 08, 2011 4:50 am Bagheera wrote: would we get something more like what we see with Asuka and Kyoko in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Dec 09, 2011 11:30 am I think it's 50/50 between the pilot and the soul.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Thu Dec 15, 2011 5:05 pm Bagheera wrote: Though I do wonder if that's as much to do with Shinji as it is with Eva mechanics. What would happen if a stronger personality was at the controls? Let's say Yui was there, and Shinji was the soul of the Eva. Would she be absorbed, or would we get something more like what we see with Asuka and Kyoko in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Reptile » Tue Jan 03, 2012 1:44 pm ''Your evas and i are composed of the very same matter, born from Adam i can synchronize with it easily as long as there is no dominant soul, and Unit 02's soul is now hiding itself'' as said by Kaworu as he is descending to Terminal Dogma, i'm re-watching Death and Rebirth and i just thought this might help a bit, basically Kyoko (Eva-02's soul) is dormant, so Kaworu can easily take control.

[]:             Quote Post by r0ach » Fri Jan 06, 2012 11:10 pm it's not that important but i wish it had gone into why kyoko's soul was hiding itself Yui seemed to have the right idea, not hiding her soul in unit-01. making it easier for Shinji to synch and whatnot kyoko is totally a bad mom

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 07, 2012 5:45 am r0ach wrote: it's not that important but i wish it had gone into why kyoko's soul was hiding itself

[]:             Quote Post by r0ach » Sat Jan 07, 2012 5:10 pm Bagheera wrote: Arael. She wasn't hiding beforehand -- Asuka was just too closed off to reach her (see the elevator scene). You try reaching out when your soul's been cut in half.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 07, 2012 5:20 pm r0ach wrote: At that point was her soul really still split? I kind of thought that the crazy part of her soul that hung itself ended up in unit-02 at some point?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Jan 07, 2012 9:21 pm This verges on pure conjecture but I've always assumed that Asuka's bragging about the production model being more difficult to synch with was correct. If some sort of safety mechanism designed to prevent absorption caused Kyoko's soul to be fragmented by the process, it may have also dulled her ability to reach Asuka and prevented berserking. That would make her end even more cruel, since she could have berserked and kicked all the harpies' asses, but her Eva was simply designed not to let her. It makes me wonder if the SEELE monoliths didn't end one of their meetings with "Also, I'd like to file a motion of 'screw with that German bitch some more'."

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Jan 07, 2012 9:58 pm Chuckman wrote: This verges on pure conjecture but I've always assumed that Asuka's bragging about the production model being more difficult to synch with was correct. If some sort of safety mechanism designed to prevent absorption caused Kyoko's soul to be fragmented by the process, it may have also dulled her ability to reach Asuka and prevented berserking.
